title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal claims it could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 by adopting AI. High-adoption teams at PayPal are deploying daily and completed a large Java upgrade 6x faster using AI tooling.
